code: import axios from"axios";const BACKEND_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL;export const API="".concat(BACKEND_URL,"/api");export const api=axios.create({baseURL:API});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("rk_token");if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});
